# Code of Conduct

## Respect and Professionalism

Treat everyone with respect. No harassment or discrimination.

## Expected Behavior

- Be helpful and constructive
- Respect different opinions and backgrounds
- Give and accept feedback professionally
- Focus on the code and project goals

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Personal attacks or insults
- Harassment of any kind
- Sharing private information without permission
- Spam or off-topic content
- Discriminatory language or behavior

## Enforcement

Violations will be handled by maintainers. First offense: warning. Repeated issues: ban.

Report problems to vcatalano@gmail.com.

## Scope

This applies to all project spaces: issues, PRs, discussions, events, etc.

---

*Keep it professional, keep it civil, keep it on-topic.*
